log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Warforged — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:9+9=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Warforged — Armored Tank (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Warforged — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:15+9=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Warforged — Armored Tank. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Warforged — Armored Tank.
→ Warforged — Armored Tank: CON save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 18 necrotic damage (half).
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Warforged — Armored Tank --- HP: 41/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:4+9=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!

→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):8+4=12 vs DC 11] MAINTAINED!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
